# Ebb and Flow Massage Studio

> Clinical massage therapy in Washington, DC specializing in lymphatic drainage, oncology massage, and craniosacral therapy.

Updated: 2026-07-05

## About

Ebb and Flow is a clinical massage studio owned and operated by Natalie Gamble, a licensed massage therapist with advanced certifications in lymphatic drainage, oncology massage, and craniosacral therapy. Natalie sees clients in Washington, DC.

Natalie's credentials include: Licensed Massage Therapist (LMT), Certified Manual Lymphatic Drainage Therapist (CMLDT), Medical Massage Practitioner (MMP), and Craniosacral Therapist (CST). She has also completed the MPS Scar Release Therapy course (Dolphin Neurostim).

## Location

### Georgetown / Glover Park
- Address: 2300 Wisconsin Ave NW, #400b, Washington, DC 20007
- Inside DC Acupuncture

## Hours

- Monday - Thursday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Friday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- By appointment only

## Contact

- Phone: (850) 529-3740
- Email: nat@ebbandflowmassagestudio.com
- Website: https://www.ebbandflowmassagestudio.com

## Services

### Lymphatic Drainage

- **Manual Lymphatic Drainage (MLD):** Gentle technique to support fluid movement, reduce swelling, and promote recovery. Used for fluid retention, post-travel swelling, seasonal wellness, and general lymphatic maintenance. Sessions can begin with optional non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation. $150 per session.
- **Pre/Post-Operative Lymphatic Massage:** Lymphatic support before and after surgery to reduce swelling, support comfort, scar healing, and recovery, including MPS scar release therapy for healed incisions. Requires provider approval. $150 per session.
- **Fertility and IVF Support Massage:** Gentle lymphatic work to support comfort during fertility treatments, including IVF. Helps with bloating, tenderness, and grounding. $150 per session.
- **Pregnancy and Postpartum Lymphatic Massage:** Lymphatic massage tailored for pregnancy-related swelling and postpartum recovery, including C-section scar tissue work and MPS scar release therapy with provider approval. $150 per session.
- **Lymphedema and Lipedema Management:** Ongoing massage support for people managing lymphedema or lipedema, focusing on heaviness, swelling, tenderness, and comfort. $150 per session.

### Oncology Massage

Safe, gentle massage adapted for people at any stage of cancer treatment, recovery, or survivorship. Natalie holds Tracy Walton's Oncology Massage certification (Medical Massage Practitioner, MMP). $130 per session.

### Craniosacral Therapy (CST)

Light-touch therapy working with the craniosacral system to support relaxation, nervous system regulation, and relief from tension patterns. $150 per session.

### Incorporated Techniques

These are not standalone services. They are incorporated into the session types above at no separate charge. Natalie completed the MPS Scar Release Therapy course and uses the Dolphin Neurostim (Microcurrent Point Stimulation) in her practice.

- **Scar Release Therapy:** Gentle Dolphin Neurostim microcurrent (MPS) applied along each side of a healed scar to soften and fade scar tissue, release adhesions, and restore circulation and lymph flow. Incorporated into Pre/Post-Operative and Pregnancy/Postpartum sessions for C-section, mastectomy, and other surgical scars once the incision is healed and cleared by a provider.
- **Vagus Nerve Stimulation (VNS):** Non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation via gentle microcurrent ear clips. Supports vagal tone and parasympathetic ("rest and digest") activity. Offered at the start of Manual Lymphatic Drainage and other bodywork sessions to deepen relaxation. Not appropriate for people with pacemakers or other implanted electrical devices, during pregnancy, or with seizure disorders.
